name: OxyGenX Pod Set – DETOX POD
shortDescription: Deep cleansing and detoxifying OxyGenX pod set. 6 capsules + 6 primer gels + 6 serums. For irritated, environmentally stressed skin.
description:
The DETOX POD set is a deep cleansing and detoxifying treatment package developed for the OxyGenX+ treatment device, designed for irritated and environmentally stressed skin.

The set contains 6 OxyGenX capsules (pods), 6 primer gels, and 6 serums – sufficient for 6 complete treatments.

During the treatment, the released CO₂ stimulates the skin's natural oxygen production (Bohr effect), while the special active ingredients deeply cleanse, detoxify, soothe, and protect the skin.
metaTitle: OxyGenX DETOX POD set – detoxifying treatment package
metaDescription: DETOX POD set for OxyGenX+ device: 6 capsules + 6 primer gels + 6 serums. Deep cleansing, detoxification, skin soothing. 12.990 Ft.

faq.question: How many treatments does a DETOX POD set last?
faq.answer: One set is sufficient for 6 complete treatments. It contains 6 capsules, 6 primer gels, and 6 serums.

faq.question: What skin type is the DETOX POD recommended for?
faq.answer: The DETOX POD is primarily recommended for irritated, environmentally stressed, and toxin-loaded skin. It deeply cleanses, detoxifies, soothes, and protects the skin.

faq.question: Which device is the DETOX POD set compatible with?
faq.answer: The DETOX POD set is designed for the OxyGenX+ device's oxy-pod applicator. It is also compatible with the HydraScan PRO+ 2026 oxy-pod applicator.
